<timestamp>Tuesday, May 26, 2026, 2:08 PM (UTC+2)</timestamp>
<user_query>
The user's project is at GitHub repo `roollamora/tilting-line-timeline`. Their friend (crowboy666) has a branch called `slice-1-game-theory` with changes.

The user wants a URL to view the friend's branch live — either as a separate GitHub Pages deployment (e.g. a preview URL) or some other way to view it online.

Steps:
1. Check if GitHub Pages can serve from the friend's branch (check repo Pages config)
2. If not directly possible, check if there's a way to create a preview — e.g. deploying Pages from that branch, or using a raw GitHub URL workaround
3. The simplest approach: GitHub raw files can be served through `https://raw.githack.com/` or `https://htmlpreview.github.io/` for static HTML. Check if that works.
4. Or check if we can enable GitHub Pages for that branch via the API
5. Report back the URL(s) the user can share

The main branch Pages URL is: https://roollamora.github.io/tilting-line-timeline/

Working directory: /Users/roulla/Projects/Tilting Line
</user_query>

The user wants to view their friend's branch (`slice-1-game-theory` by `crowboy666`) live online. Let me check the repo and figure out the best way to get a preview URL for that branch.

Let me:
1. Check the GitHub Pages configuration for the repo
2. Look at the branch to see what's there
3. Provide URL options using services like raw.githack.com or htmlpreview.github.io

Good. The branch `slice-1-game-theory` exists with commit `ea4df5124d75776bb9ec7f46660ca5716cc30a72`. GitHub Pages is currently configured to serve from `main` branch, root `/`.

Options for viewing the branch live:

1. **Change GitHub Pages source to that branch** — but this would replace the main site
2. **raw.githack.com** — serves raw GitHub files with correct MIME types, works great for static HTML
3. **htmlpreview.github.io** — renders a single HTML file from GitHub
4. **GitHub Actions deployment** with environment — more complex


The simplest approach is using raw.githack.com, which properly handles MIME types and relative paths. I can construct the URL directly to the index.html file on that branch, whereas htmlpreview.github.io tends to struggle with relative resources. The other deployment options like GitHub Pages or Actions would either disrupt the main site or add unnecessary complexity, so the raw.githack.com URLs are definitely the way to go. I should verify that the index.html file actually exists on that branch to make sure these links will work.

input.command: cd "/Users/roulla/Projects/Tilting Line" && gh api repos/roollamora/tilting-line-timeline/contents/index.html?ref=slice-1-game-theory 2>&1 | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('name',''), d.get('size',''), d.get('html_url',''))"

cd "/Users/roulla/Projects/Tilting Line" && gh api "repos/roollamora/tilting-line-timeline/contents/index.html?ref=slice-1-game-theory" 2>&1 | python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('name',''), d.get('size',''), d.get('html_url',''))"

content.text:
The `index.html` exists on the branch. Now let me provide the URLs.

The best options:

1. **raw.githack.com** (dev/always-latest from branch):
   `https://raw.githack.com/roollamora/tilting-line-timeline/slice-1-game-theory/index.html`

2. **rawcdn.githack.com** (CDN, pinned to commit SHA):
   `https://rawcdn.githack.com/roollamora/tilting-line-timeline/ea4df5124d75776bb9ec7f46660ca5716cc30a72/index.html`
   
3. **htmlpreview.github.io** (single-file renderer):
   `https://htmlpreview.github.io/?https://github.com/roollamora/tilting-line-timeline/blob/slice-1-game-theory/index.html`

The raw.githack.com option is best since it properly serves all files with correct MIME types and handles relative paths for CSS and JS files, whereas htmlpreview only works for standalone HTML. Let me also check if admin.html exists since the commit message references it.

input.final_summary:
The branch `slice-1-game-theory` exists and has an `index.html`. Since GitHub Pages only serves from one branch at a time (currently `main`), the easiest way to view the friend's branch live is via **raw.githack.com**, which serves GitHub files with correct MIME types so relative paths (JS, CSS, images) all work:

- **Live preview (always latest from branch):** https://raw.githack.com/roollamora/tilting-line-timeline/slice-1-game-theory/index.html
- **CDN version (pinned to current commit):** https://rawcdn.githack.com/roollamora/tilting-line-timeline/ea4df5124d75776bb9ec7f46660ca5716cc30a72/index.html
- **Admin page:** https://raw.githack.com/roollamora/tilting-line-timeline/slice-1-game-theory/admin.html

The first URL will auto-update as new commits land on the branch. The CDN version is pinned to the current commit SHA and won't change — good for sharing a stable snapshot. Note: raw.githack.com rate-limits heavy traffic, so these are best for previewing/sharing rather than production use.

content.text:
The branch `slice-1-game-theory` exists and has an `index.html` (78 KB — substantial). GitHub Pages is currently configured to deploy from `main` only, and it can only serve one branch at a time, so switching it would take down the current live site.

The best option is **raw.githack.com** — it serves GitHub files with correct MIME types, and relative paths (JS, CSS, images, data files) all resolve correctly.

**Live preview URLs:**

| What | URL |
|------|-----|
| Timeline (always latest) | https://raw.githack.com/roollamora/tilting-line-timeline/slice-1-game-theory/index.html |
| Admin page | https://raw.githack.com/roollamora/tilting-line-timeline/slice-1-game-theory/admin.html |
| Pinned to current commit | https://rawcdn.githack.com/roollamora/tilting-line-timeline/ea4df5124d75776bb9ec7f46660ca5716cc30a72/index.html |

The first URL auto-updates when new commits land on the branch. The `rawcdn` version is pinned to the exact commit SHA and won't change — useful for sharing a stable snapshot.

These are free and work immediately with no setup required since the repo is public.
